title: Sqlitelogic test infinite loop while compiling SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), amount DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, amount) VALUES (1, 'test1', 100.50), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 200.00);
SELECT id, value, amount, (CASE WHEN amount IS NULL THEN 'No Amount' ELSE 'Has Amount' END) AS amount_status FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE amount > 50);
UPDATE test_table SET amount = amount + 10 WHERE value LIKE 'test%';
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(amount, 0)) AS total_amount FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Infinite loop while compiling complex SQL query
